narrative:
Union Twp township has 1,162 registered voters, with 43.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.5 percentage points.
